content.title: Welcome to Tender's Server!
content.text:
Welcome to <TextStyle.LightBlue>Tender's super nice dedicated server</>!

We're currently running the <TextStyle.Green>Extinction</> map.

Press <TextStyle.Yellow>F1</> at any time to open this menu.

Check out the <TextStyle.Orange>Rules</> and <TextStyle.LightBlue>Rates</> tabs for more info.

Enjoy your stay and have fun!

content.title: Server Rules
content.text:
<TextStyle.Red>1.</> Don't be a faggot.

<TextStyle.Red>2.</> Respect the building space and inventory of others.

<TextStyle.Red>3.</> Bishop's inventory can be accessed at any time by anyone.

<TextStyle.Orange>Breaking these rules may result in a warning or ban.</>

content.title: General Rates
content.text:
<TextStyle.LightBlue>XP:</> <TextStyle.Green>3x</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Harvesting:</> <TextStyle.Green>5x</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Taming:</> <TextStyle.Green>10x</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Difficulty:</> <TextStyle.Green>5.0</> (Max Wild Lvl 150)

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Max Players:</> <TextStyle.Green>70</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Max Tribe Size:</> <TextStyle.Green>10</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Max Tamed Dinos:</> <TextStyle.Green>5000</>

content.text:

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Imprint Amount:</> <TextStyle.Green>5x</>

<TextStyle.LightBlue>Baby Food Consumption:</> <TextStyle.Green>3x</>
